CONTENT.Club career: On 22 May 2019, Qarayev signed a new two-year contract with Qarabağ.Qarayev left Qarabağ on 24 July 2023, with Neftçi announcing his signing to a two-year contract with the option of an additional year the same day. On 19 September 2024, Neftçi announced the departure of Qarayev from the club by mutual agreement.
CONTENT.Personal life: Qara Qarayev was born on 12 October 1992 in Füzuli.
CONTENT.External links: Gara Garayev at SoccerwayProfile on official club websiteGara Garayev at National-Football-Teams.com
CONTENT.Career statistics: As of match played 18 May 2024Statistics accurate as of match played 17 June 2022

SUMMARY: Qara Elxan oğlu Qarayev (born 12 October 1992) is an Azerbaijani professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Azerbaijan national team. He has been twice selected as the footballer of the year in Azerbaijan in 2014 and 2020.
